verses.2: “Even today my complaint is rebellion; His hand is heavy despite my groaning.
verses.3: “Oh that I knew how to find Him, That I might come to His home!
verses.4: “I would present my case before Him And fill my mouth with arguments.
verses.5: “I would learn the words which He would answer, And perceive what He would tell me.
verses.6: “Would He contend with me by the greatness of His power? No, surely He would pay attention to me.
verses.7: “There the upright would argue with Him; And I would be free of my Judge forever.
verses.8: “Behold, I go forward but He is not there, And backward, but I cannot perceive Him;
verses.9: When He acts on the left, I cannot see Him; He turns to the right, but I cannot see Him.
verses.10: “But He knows the way I take; When He has put me to the test, I will come out as gold.
verses.11: “My foot has held on to His path; I have kept His way and not turned aside.
verses.12: “I have not failed the command of His lips; I have treasured the words of His mouth more than my necessary food.
verses.13: “But He is unique, and who can make Him turn? Whatever His soul desires, He does it.
verses.14: “For He carries out what is destined for me, And many such destinies are with Him.
verses.15: “Therefore, I would be terrified at His presence; When I consider this, I am frightened of Him.
verses.16: “ It is God who has made my heart faint, And the Almighty who has terrified me,
verses.17: But I am not destroyed by darkness, Nor by deep gloom which covers me.
